sections.paragraph:
verb לעשון (>>לַעֲשֹׁן)

to smoke, emit smoke; fume, be angry, furious

verb לעשן

to smoke; emit smoke; fumigate; preserve and flavor food by exposing it to wood smoke

verb עושן

be smoked; cured; fumigated

verb לעשן (>>עישן)

to fumigate; cure

masculine noun

smoke, fume, fumes, reek

adjective

belching, smoking
